state_pressure.basis: May 27 session overlay — stable state pressure per published read.

session_context: May 27 session overlay: SPX moderate vs bands (7,400 / 7,625); 10Y elevated Z; WTI falling vs mean.

drafts.x:
S&P 500 pushing higher while the rest of the board is watching.
Needs oil to break the range — only then does it matter.

SPX 7,513. 10Y 4.48%. Oil $90.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,625 or below 7,400
• 10Y moves beyond 4.68% or below 4.28%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Transitional | From restrictive
CONFIDENCE: High (78/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Stable

Snapshot — May 27, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,512.75   z +1.60
  10Y Yield:      4.481%  z +1.05
  WTI Oil:        89.70   z -0.64

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,513 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.48% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $90 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,625 or below 7,400
• 10Y moves beyond 4.68% or below 4.28%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
